name: Chicken Hill
short_description: Find 250 Genjouin of various species and hundreds of items for brother KUN. Rescue your frustrated and devastated brother KUN in the KUN space. We are the most devout believers.
detailed_description:
Declaration：This game contains a large number of Chinese contextual harmonic stems, and the plot is also referenced from Chinese popular meme culture, so it is untranslatable! It is difficult to master these, so please buy with caution for non-native Chinese speakers!

Find 250 Genjouin of various species and hundreds of items for brother KUN. In the KUN space, Rescue your frustrated and devastated brother KUN in the KUN space. We are the most devout believers.
Unlike many KUN-like horror games, this is a casual marathon collector's game, with 250 hand-drawn, varied little chicken by pure artists, to find them all.

KUN Features


❤ 250 Chinese Harmonised Stems.
❤ Warming our brother KUN's heart.
❤ Play time 25 minutes ~ 1 kun hour.
❤ Extra racing rating mode.
❤ Hidden secret events.

For those of you who like to find cat-based marathon collection games, come together to save our brother KUN.
